sleepTargets.label: Nap 1
sleepTargets.notes: Start the first nap after a calm first wake window.

sleepTargets.label: Nap 2
sleepTargets.notes: Keep the room dark and the wind-down short.

sleepTargets.label: Nap 3
sleepTargets.notes: A contact nap is okay if the day is starting to unravel.

sleepTargets.label: Nap 4
sleepTargets.notes: Protect this nap if bedtime is drifting too early.

sleepTargets.label: Bedtime
sleepTargets.notes: Bring bedtime earlier after a rough nap day.

feedTargets.label: Morning feed
feedTargets.notes: Offer a full feed soon after the day starts.

feedTargets.label: Day feeds
feedTargets.notes: Aim for regular daytime feeds before overtiredness builds.

feedTargets.label: Late afternoon feed
feedTargets.notes: This can help bridge the last nap and bedtime.

feedTargets.label: Bedtime feed
feedTargets.notes: Keep the last feed calm and unhurried.

notes: Here's Somni's customised baseline plan to help {{babyName}} start sleeping better. Somni will adjust it as we learn more and as your baby grows and develops.
